title: [FIRRTL] Excessive DSP slice use on Xilinx FPGAs

features.name: 64bit multiplication with conditional sign extension
features.description: Code should include a 64-bit multiplication operation where operands are conditionally sign-extended based on control signals

features.name: bit reduction result used in extension condition
features.description: Code should include a reduction operation (e.g., andr, orr) where the result controls sign extension of multiplication operands

features.name: signed multiplication with explicit sign cast
features.description: Code should include a signed multiplication using $signed cast on sign-extended operands to 65 bits
